theme.archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Modified with Dark/Neon accents)
theme.description: A premium, high-end SaaS tool with electric neon accents against a pure dark canvas. No standard tech-blue templates.

guidelines.backgrounds: Use var(--bg-primary) for the main body, var(--bg-card) for content sections.
guidelines.accents: Use the purple and pink as sharp, intentional highlights. Create gradients with them sparingly, like 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[color:var(--accent-purple)] to-[color:var(--accent-pink)]'.
guidelines.borders: 1px solid var(--border). Never rely solely on shadows for cards.
guidelines.glows: Subtle neon dropshadows on primary actions. E.g., 'drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)]'.

headings.styling: Capitalize key words. Use the 'Inter' system sans but with intense weight contrast to body text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the dark canvas to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Max width 'max-w-7xl' centered. Use 'p-8' or 'p-12' on cards instead of the standard 'p-4'.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID' for Output and 'MODE A: TETRIS GRID' for the Hero and Setup sections.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Subtle rounded corners (rounded-xl or rounded-2xl), background var(--bg-card), 1px solid var(--border).

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[color:var(--accent-purple)] to-[color:var(--accent-pink)] text-white font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out hover:scale-[1.02] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[color:var(--bg-input)] text-[color:var(--text-primary)] border border-[color:var(--border)] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out hover:scale-[1.02] hover:bg-[#2A2A2A]

inputs.text: bg-[color:var(--bg-input)] border border-[color:var(--border)] text-[color:var(--text-primary)] rounded-lg p-4 w-full focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[color:var(--accent-purple)] transition-all duration-300

waveforms.animation: CSS/JS-driven bar height scaling. Multiple rounded divs spanning vertically, animated with standard CSS keyframes simulating audio frequency.

status_indicators.speaking: Animated waveform using var(--accent-purple) and var(--accent-pink).
status_indicators.thinking: Slow opacity pulse on an orb or minimal dot sequence.

interactions.transitions: All state changes must use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out'.
interactions.hover_states: Buttons scale(1.02) and emit a subtle glow shadow.
interactions.focus_states: Inputs receive a 2px ring of var(--accent-purple) with zero offset.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure var(--text-muted) passes contrast against var(--bg-card). Use text-shadow on text placed over abstract imagery if necessary.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="start-episode-button"').

images.description: Dark room microphone with neon lights. Use behind a dark gradient overlay (e.g., from-[#0A0A0A] to-transparent) on the Hero screen.
Abstract purple and white wavy lines on black background. Use as an animated rotating or panning background element on the GENERATION loading screen.

hero.layout: Centered massive typography with the hero_background image heavily overlaid with black gradient to ensure text readability.
hero.elements: Brand logo, ultra-bold tagline (H1), subtle subtext, and 'Start My Episode' primary CTA button.

voice_setup.layout: Clean, single-column focused form centered on the screen. Generous spacing between inputs.
voice_setup.elements: 5 input fields (Name, Archetype, Controversy Level, Show Name, Energy Word). Prominent 'Next' button.

conversation.layout: Minimalist HUD style. Focus is purely on the voice interaction.
conversation.elements: Large animated CSS waveform in the center (Jordan's voice). Real-time transcript box below it (user's voice). Top right: Q&A progress indicator (e.g., '3 / 8'). Agent status indicators (Listening/Speaking/Thinking) clearly visible.

generation.elements: Pulsating abstract wave image background, loading spinner or progress bar, and text 'Gemini is generating your episode...'.

output.layout: Bento-style CSS Grid layout (Control Room mode) strictly utilizing max screen estate.
output.elements: Cards for: Title & Hook, Full Script, Show Notes, Tags, Call-to-Action, Listener Persona, Audiogram Script, Tweet Copy. Each card has a 'Copy' button. Top section features a sticky TTS playback bar with a play button and animated waveform.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use Shadcn, Material UI, or ANY external UI component library. Build exclusively with React and Tailwind CSS.
Use the exact CSS variables provided in the design guidelines. Map them in Tailwind config or directly in index.css as :root vars.
Ensure all buttons have the required scale(1.02) transform and glow effect on hover.
Use standard Inter or system-sans-serif, but enforce tight tracking and heavy weights for headings.
Implement the animated waveform purely using CSS keyframes and multiple vertical divs.
Implement all 5 screens exactly as specified in a logical flow (Hero -> Setup -> Conversation -> Generation -> Output).
API backend (/agent) runs on FastAPI Python. Build frontend logic accordingly.
